criteria.description: Severity levels are color-coded when outputting to a TTY
criteria.evidence: StreamEntry now calls FormatTextColor with colorEnabled parameter. search.go detects TTY via output.IsTerminal(os.Stdout) and passes the result. TestOU3_StreamEntryColorEnabled confirms ANSI red codes for error level, TestOU3_StreamEntryWarnColor confirms yellow for warn.

criteria.description: Colors are disabled automatically when stdout is not a TTY
criteria.evidence: IsTerminal checks os.ModeCharDevice bit, returns false for pipes. search.go passes IsTerminal result as colorEnabled to StreamEntry. TestOU3_IsTerminalPipe confirms false for pipe. TestOU3_StreamEntryColorDisabled confirms no ANSI codes when color=false.
